'''Saloor''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Death/Legends|assassinated]] by the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Ma'w'shiye]].<ref name="AJ1" />
